'''âp-g-h-t''' ('''kapaghetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jingoize|jingoize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jingoize|jingoize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-g-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| kapaghetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipaghetoko|thipaghetoko]] || [[word:jipaghetoko|jipaghetoko]] || [[word:shipaghetoko|shipaghetoko]] || [[word:kipaghetoko|kipaghetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupaghetoko|thuthupaghetoko]] || [[word:jujupaghetoko|jujupaghetoko]] || [[word:shushupaghetoko|shushupaghetoko]] || [[word:kukupaghetoko|kukupaghetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupaghetoko|thupaghetoko]] || [[word:jupaghetoko|jupaghetoko]] || [[word:shupaghetoko|shupaghetoko]] || [[word:kupaghetoko|kupaghetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupaghetoko|thupaghetoko]] || [[word:jupaghetoko|jupaghetoko]] || [[word:shupaghetoko|shupaghetoko]] || [[word:kupaghetoko|kupaghetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepaghetoko|thepaghetoko]] || [[word:jepaghetoko|jepaghetoko]] || [[word:shepaghetoko|shepaghetoko]] || [[word:kepaghetoko|kepaghetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopaghetoko|thothopaghetoko]] || [[word:jojopaghetoko|jojopaghetoko]] || [[word:shoshopaghetoko|shoshopaghetoko]] || [[word:kokopaghetoko|kokopaghetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopaghetoko|thopaghetoko]] || [[word:jopaghetoko|jopaghetoko]] || [[word:shopaghetoko|shopaghetoko]] || [[word:kopaghetoko|kopaghetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopaghetoko|thopaghetoko]] || [[word:jopaghetoko|jopaghetoko]] || [[word:shopaghetoko|shopaghetoko]] || [[word:kopaghetoko|kopaghetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpaghetoko|thĂŠpaghetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpaghetoko|jĂŠpaghetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpaghetoko|shĂŠpaghetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpaghetoko|kĂŠpaghetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapaghetoko|thathapaghetoko]] || [[word:jajapaghetoko|jajapaghetoko]] || [[word:shashapaghetoko|shashapaghetoko]] || [[word:kakapaghetoko|kakapaghetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapaghetoko|thapaghetoko]] || [[word:japaghetoko|japaghetoko]] || [[word:shapaghetoko|shapaghetoko]] || [[word:kapaghetoko|kapaghetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapaghetoko|thapaghetoko]] || [[word:japaghetoko|japaghetoko]] || [[word:shapaghetoko|shapaghetoko]] || [[word:kapaghetoko|kapaghetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapaghetithi|shapaghetithi]] || [[word:shapaghetiji|shapaghetiji]] || [[word:shapaghetishi|shapaghetishi]] || [[word:shapaghetiki|shapaghetiki]]
